matchingDescription: VPN service, fast speeds, privacy, secure broadband connection, streaming access

variants.text: ExpressVPN consistently ranks among the fastest VPN services in independent speed tests — stream, browse, and download without slowdown.
ExpressVPN's independently audited no-logs policy means your browsing activity is never recorded — privacy you can verify, not just trust.
Access streaming libraries from different regions with ExpressVPN — works with major platforms and is regularly updated to stay ahead of VPN blocks.

Under the Investigatory Powers Act 2016, UK internet providers are required to retain customers' browsing history for 12 months and make it available to government agencies on request. A VPN encrypts traffic before it reaches your ISP.

Ofcom's 2024 Connected Nations report found UK average home broadband speeds reached 129 Mbps — but VPN overhead typically reduces effective throughput by 10-20%. Premium VPN services using modern protocols like Lightway or WireGuard reduce this gap significantly.

The NCSC's 2024 guidance warns that unencrypted public Wi-Fi allows attackers to intercept login credentials and session tokens. A 2023 Forbes Advisor survey found 40% of UK adults have experienced suspicious activity after using public Wi-Fi.
